title: Retry Policy
description: Codifies the per-failure-class retry policy for the AI-generation pipeline so two implementers cannot ship two different policies. Three failure classes are pinned: shape (re-prompt with the validation report attached as a fix-this instruction), coherence (re-prompt with resolved-ID hints, then drop the referencing record), and balance (route to the optimizer; no re-prompt). Each entry carries a `maxAttempts`, an `onExhaust` action, and a `backoff` strategy.

maxAttempts.description: Maximum number of retry attempts after the first failure. 0 means do not retry.

onExhaust.description: Action to take after `maxAttempts` is exhausted. `fail` returns the failure report up the stack; `degrade` drops the offending record and proceeds; `escalate-to-user` surfaces a UI prompt for human direction.
